title: Whole30 Feta Stuffed Chicken
description: A delicious and healthy Whole30 dish featuring chicken breast stuffed with feta cheese and herbs.
instructions: Rinse the chicken breasts and pat them dry with paper towels.
In a small bowl, mix together the feta cheese, bliss, parsley, garlic, salt, and pepper.
Cut a horizontal slit in each chicken breast to create a pocket.
Stuff each chicken breast with the feta cheese mixture.
Drizzle the olive oil over the chicken breasts and rub to coat.
Place the chicken breasts on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake for 25-30 minutes or until the chicken is cooked through and reaches an internal temperature of 165°F (74°C).
Let the chicken rest for 5 minutes before slicing and serving.
